scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.start:server: npm run build:server && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --only birthday-server --update-env
scripts.start:server:dev: npm run build:server && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --only birthday-server --env dev --update-env
scripts.start:client: npm run build:client && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --only birthday-client --update-env
scripts.start:client:dev: npm run build:client && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --only birthday-client --env dev --update-env
scripts.start: npm run build && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --update-env
scripts.start:dev: npm run build && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --env dev --update-env
scripts.deploy:mac: npm run build:client && node scripts/deploy.js mac
scripts.deploy:win: npm run build:client && node scripts/deploy.js win
